init_eqs_str: a['lbbtime'] = 0; a['bbtime'] = 0; a['rs'] = 0; a['beatb'] = 0; a['avgbeatrate'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['q5'] = 0; a['avgvol'] = 0; a['beatrate'] = 0; a['q4'] = 0; a['lbass'] = 0; a['rawbeatb'] = 0; a['db'] = 0; a['vol'] = 0; a['bc'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['q3'] = 0; a['q7'] = 0; a['mtime'] = 0; a['avgdb'] = 0; a['beatrate']=5; a['avgbeatrate']=1; a['bbtime']=1; a['lbbtime']=0.5; a['avgdb']=0.5; a['vol']=1; a['avgvol']=0.2;
frame_eqs_str: a['db']=((a['bass']-a['lbass'])*a['fps']); a['lbass']=a['bass']; a['avgdb']=((a['avgdb']*0.99)+(Math.abs(a['db'])*0.01)); a['rawbeatb']=above(a['db'], (a['avgdb']*2)); a['beatb']=((a['rawbeatb']*above((a['time']-a['lbbtime']), (0.75*a['avgbeatrate'])))*above(a['bass_att'], 0.3)); a['bbtime']=(a['time']*a['beatb']); a['beatrate']=((a['beatb']*(a['bbtime']-a['lbbtime']))+((1-a['beatb'])*a['beatrate'])); a['avgbeatrate']=((a['beatb']*((a['avgbeatrate']*0.999)+(a['beatrate']*0.001)))+((1-a['beatb'])*a['avgbeatrate'])); a['lbbtime']=((a['time']*a['beatb'])+((1-a['beatb'])*a['lbbtime'])); a['bc']=(a['bc']+a['beatb']); a['vol']=((a['rawbeatb']*(a['db']-a['avgdb']))*0.01); a['avgvol']=((a['avgvol']*0.99)+(a['vol']*0.05)); a['mtime']=(a['mtime']+Math.min((a['avgvol']*0.5), 0.25)); a['q2']=((Math.sin(a['mtime'])*0.5)+0.5); a['q1']=a['beatb']; a['q3']=a['db']; a['q4']=a['avgbeatrate']; a['q5']=(equal(mod(a['bc'],4), 0)*a['beatb']); a['q7']=a['rs']; a['decay']=0.99; a['warp']=0; a['wrap']=1; a['dx']=0.005;
